assessment.note: He can self-assess honestly but explicitly says he is not sure he is targeting the highest-leverage work, which is a strong clarity gap.

new_queue.label: Highest-leverage work
new_queue.name: You said 'highest-leverage work' — what work do you think should have had more of you?
new_queue.description: Drills into his own leverage example so the conversation moves from self-read into concrete evidence.

new_queue.label: Principal impact evidence
new_queue.name: What have you done recently that best shows Principal-level leverage on this team?
new_queue.description: Surfaces concrete examples of visible leverage rather than steady execution.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Question-asking pattern
new_queue.name: What makes you hold back from asking questions early?
new_queue.description: Explores whether low question volume is confidence, habit, or a working style issue.

new_queue.label: Next behavior change
new_queue.name: What is the first change you want to make before our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes on one concrete behaviour shift with a near-term commitment.
